title: Fresh Animations x Baby Animals Remastered
description: Fresh Animations compatibility for Baby Animals Remastered.
body:
## Fresh Animations x Baby Animals Remastered Compat
This is a fork of Baby Animals Remastered x Fresh Animations v1 by Kizzycocoa for 1.21.5 and higher, because the original pack was not compatible with those versions. Since they already support 1.21.5 and higher, this pack is no longer needed.


- The original Compat by Kizzycocoa can be downloaded in [Fresh MC Discord Server]([https://discord.com/channels/785688843982471209/1263501036862050395/1263501036862050395](https://discord.gg/HH5dwHXF)) inside [this channel](https://discord.com/channels/785688843982471209/1263501036862050395/1263501036862050395).
- The original Baby Animals Remastered can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/baby-animals-remastered).
- Fresh Animations can be downloaded [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations).

## Completed Mobs:
- **Wolf** (with all of their variants)
- **Chicken** (with all of their variants)
- **Sheep** (with all of their variants)
- **Mooshroom** (with all of their variants)

## Incomplete Mobs:
- **Cows**
- **Pigs**

## Previews:
![Baby Wolf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CherubicBoot/preview/refs/heads/main/BAR-wolf.png)

![Baby Sheep](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CherubicBoot/preview/refs/heads/main/BAR-sheep.png)

---

## Check out my other mods!

- [Ray's Pet Teleport Fix](https://modrinth.com/datapack/pet-teleport-fix): Allows pets to load chunks so they no longer stuck in unloaded chunks!
- [Stationary Happy Ghast](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stationary-happy-ghast): "Sit" your ghast so they no longer flew away!
- [Hold My Lantern](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hold-my-lantern): Hold your lantern in 3D in both third person and first person while keeping the vanilla style!
